stemHtml: After take-off from runway 09 with clearance to climb straight ahead to 4000 ft before turning right heading 270, the aircraft suffers a receiver failure in VMC. The blind transmission should end with...

options.a: ...RIGHT TURN HEADING 270 SPEED 160 KNOTS. CONTINUING VFR FOR LANDING RWY 09."
options.b: ...RIGHT TURN. CONTINUING VFR FOR LANDING RWY 09. NEXT REPORT FINAL."
options.c: ...RIGHT TURN HEADING 270 MAINTAINING 4000 FT. CONTINUING VFR FOR LANDING RWY 09."
options.d: ...RIGHT TURN MAINTAINING 4000 FT. NEXT REPORT AT TIME 1201. ALL STATIONS RADIO CHECK."
